name: 51视频 - 吃瓜爆料
desc: 全网最新吃瓜爆料与福利视频，每日更新网红黑料、社会猛料

js.category: async function getCategory() { return [ { id: 'wpcz', text: '今日推荐' }, { id: 'lpjp', text: '撸片精品' }, { id: 'meiridasai', text: '每日大赛' }, { id: 'rdsj', text: '吃瓜爆料' }, { id: 'lljx', text: '伦理精选' }, { id: 'xsxy', text: '学生校园' }, { id: 'tynd', text: '体育男大' }, { id: 'smtt', text: '色漫天堂' }, { id: 'whhl', text: '网红黑料' }, { id: 'ysyl', text: '看片娱乐' }, { id: 'cqdb', text: '超前点播' }, { id: 'qubk', text: '奇趣百科' }, { id: '51yc', text: '51原创' }, { id: 'dyds', text: '短剧影视' } ]; }
js.home: async function getHome(page = 1) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const url = page === 1 ? baseUrl : `${baseUrl}/page/${page}/`; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`); const html = await response.text(); const list = []; const articleRegex = /]*>(.*?)/gs; let articleMatch; while ((articleMatch = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { const articleHtml = articleMatch[1]; const linkMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*>/i); if (!linkMatch) continue; const vod_id = linkMatch[1].trim(); let title = ''; const titleMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>(.*?)/is); if (titleMatch) { title = titleMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); } let vod_pic = ''; const bgMatch = articleHtml.match(/background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)['"]?\)/i); if (bgMatch) { vod_pic = bgMatch[1]; } else { const imgMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*src="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/i); if (imgMatch) { vod_pic = imgMatch[1]; } } let remarks = ''; const categoryMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*itemprop="datePublished"[^>]*>.*?<\/span>\s*([^<]+)<\/span>/i); if (categoryMatch) { remarks = categoryMatch[1].trim(); } if (title && !articleHtml.includes('post-card-ads')) { list.push({ vod_id, vod_name: title, vod_pic: vod_pic || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: remarks || '热门爆料', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } let pagecount = 1; const pageRegex = /]*>(\d+)<\/a>/g; let pageMatch; const pages = []; while ((pageMatch = pageRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { pages.push(parseInt(pageMatch[2])); } if (pages.length > 0) { pagecount = Math.max(...pages); } else { pagecount = 1231; } return { page, pagecount, list }; } catch (error) { return { page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }; } }
js.search: async function getSearch(keyword, page = 1) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const encodedKeyword = encodeURIComponent(keyword); const url = page === 1 ? `${baseUrl}/?s=${encodedKeyword}` : `${baseUrl}/page/${page}/?s=${encodedKeyword}`; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`); const html = await response.text(); const list = []; const articleRegex = /]*>(.*?)/gs; let articleMatch; while ((articleMatch = articleRegex.exec(html)) !== null) { const articleHtml = articleMatch[1]; const linkMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*>/i); if (!linkMatch) continue; const vod_id = linkMatch[1].trim(); let title = ''; const titleMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>(.*?)/is); if (titleMatch) { title = titleMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); } let vod_pic = ''; const bgMatch = articleHtml.match(/background-image:\s*url\(['"]?([^'"]+)['"]?\)/i); if (bgMatch) { vod_pic = bgMatch[1]; } else { const imgMatch = articleHtml.match(/]*src="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/i); if (imgMatch) { vod_pic = imgMatch[1]; } } if (title && !articleHtml.includes('post-card-ads')) { list.push({ vod_id, vod_name: title, vod_pic: vod_pic || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '搜索结果', vod_play_from: '51视频' }); } } return { page, pagecount: 1, list }; } catch (error) { return { page, pagecount: 1, list: [] }; } }
js.detail: async function getDetail(id) { try { const baseUrl = 'https://d3an8gb8ri1qwv.cloudfront.net'; const url = id.startsWith('http') ? id : `${baseUrl}${id}`; const response = await fetch(url, { headers: { 'User-Agent': 'Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36' } }); if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP error! status: ${response.status}`); const html = await response.text(); let title = ''; const titleMatch = html.match(/]*class="post-title"[^>]*>(.*?)/is) || html.match(/]*class="post-card-title"[^>]*>(.*?)/is); if (titleMatch) { title = titleMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').trim(); } let content = ''; const contentMatch = html.match(/]*class="post-content"[^>]*>(.*?)/is); if (contentMatch) { content = contentMatch[1].replace(/<[^>]*>/g, '').substring(0, 200) + '...'; } let pic = ''; const picMatch = html.match(/]*property="og:image"[^>]*content="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/i) || html.match(/]*class="post-cover"[^>]*src="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/i); if (picMatch) { pic = picMatch[1]; } let videoUrl = ''; const videoRegex = /(https?:\/\/[^"'\s]+\.(?:mp4|m3u8|flv|mkv|avi)[^"'\s]*)/gi; const videoMatch = html.match(videoRegex); const iframeRegex = /]*src="([^"]+)"[^>]*>/gi; const iframeMatch = iframeRegex.exec(html); if (videoMatch && videoMatch.length > 0) { videoUrl = videoMatch[0]; } else if (iframeMatch) { videoUrl = iframeMatch[1]; } let playUrl = ''; if (videoUrl) { playUrl = `在线播放$${videoUrl}`; } else { playUrl = `在线播放$${url}`; } return { vod_id: id, vod_name: title || '51视频', vod_pic: pic || 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '点击播放', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: playUrl, vod_content: content || '热门吃瓜爆料视频，请点击播放按钮观看' }; } catch (error) { return { vod_id: id, vod_name: '51视频', vod_pic: 'https://51sptv.com/usr/themes/Mirages/images/51cg.png', vod_remarks: '加载失败', vod_play_from: '51视频', vod_play_url: `在线播放$${id}`, vod_content: '详情加载失败，请重试' }; } }
